description:
MiMo-V2.5-Pro is Xiaomi’s most capable model, designed for advanced agentic workflows, complex software engineering, and long-horizon tasks with strong instruction following and coherence across very long contexts. It can sustain complex autonomous work over more than a thousand tool calls while delivering frontier-level capability with strong token efficiency.

Notes: 
- Pricing is 2x when input tokens >256k
- Context window: 1M

This bot supports optional parameters for additional customization.
